Metadata.title: Šljakam — jobs with clarity and trust
Metadata.description: Modern hiring for Serbia: fast search, transparent listings, and verified employers.

Editorial.aboutHeroSubtitle: Šljakam helps candidates and employers connect through clear listings, practical workflows, and better quality signals.
Editorial.aboutPillar1Body: Every role is structured with clear expectations, concrete details, and transparent context so candidates can decide faster.
Editorial.aboutPillar2Body: From language and categories to workflows, we design around how teams and candidates actually hire and apply here.
Editorial.aboutPillar3Body: Moderation, employer context, and policy controls keep the signal strong and reduce low-quality posting patterns.
Editorial.aboutJourneyStep1Body: Make discovery feel effortless for candidates and hiring teams.
Editorial.aboutJourneyStep2Body: Help employers publish better listings with practical guidance and tooling.
Editorial.aboutJourneyStep3Body: Connect verified demand with qualified talent, faster and with less friction.
Editorial.aboutCtaBody: Browse current roles or sign in to access your tailored workspace.

SignIn.metaDescription: Sign in to Šljakam as a candidate or employer.
SignIn.title: Who are you signing in as?
SignIn.subtitle: Pick the portal that matches how you use Šljakam. You can switch language anytime from the header.
SignIn.candidateDescription: Save applications, build your profile, and track roles in one place.
SignIn.employerDescription: Post jobs, manage listings, and review applicants from your workspace.

Home.headline: Find Your Next Career Move
Home.subhead: Discover top opportunities from verified employers across Serbia — fast, transparent, and built for you.
Home.candidatePortalBody: Build your profile, upload a CV, save jobs, and apply — all in one place.
Home.employerPortalBody: Post jobs, discover talent, and manage your hiring pipeline effortlessly.
Home.staffPortalBody: Internal staff can review submissions, publish approved jobs, and manage marketplace quality.
Home.featuredSpotlightSubtitle: Highlighted positions from top employers on Šljakam.
Home.audiencePathsSubtitle: Whether you're hiring or looking — Šljakam has the tools you need.
Home.howStep1Body: Filter jobs by keyword, city, or category. New listings appear as soon as they go live.
Home.howStep2Body: View company profiles, job details, and Easy Apply options — all in one view.
Home.howStep3Body: Submit applications, build your CV, and track progress from your personal dashboard.
Home.spotlightCategoriesSubtitle: Discover opportunities across the most popular disciplines.
Home.spotlightCitiesSubtitle: Browse roles in Serbia's major employment hubs.

Jobs.title: Jobs
Jobs.listDescription: Search published roles by keyword (title and description), city, and category. Results sort by newest first.
Jobs.emptyBody: When employers publish jobs, they will show up here. If you are developing locally, run the seed SQL to insert a sample listing.
Jobs.error404Hint: 404 usually means the browser asked the wrong server. NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL must be the Nest API (default http://localhost:4000), not the Next.js app (port 3000). Restart the dev server after changing .env.
Jobs.errorNoApi: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in .env so the site can reach the API (e.g. http://localhost:4000).
Jobs.previewPlaceholder: Select a job from the list to preview details.
Jobs.previewLoadError: Could not load this listing. Try again or open the job page.
Jobs.jobAlertSaved: Search saved — we’ll notify you when alerts launch.
Jobs.twoColumnNavHint: Tip: on desktop, pick a job to preview it beside the list.
Jobs.infiniteListError: Could not load more jobs. Scroll up and try again.

JobDetail.previewNotPublished: Not published yet — dates will appear once the listing is live.
JobDetail.applyPreviewNote: Apply options appear here once the listing is published.
JobDetail.applyHint: Sign in as a candidate to submit your application and optional CV.
JobDetail.applyHintExternal: Applications for this role are handled on the employer’s website. Opens in a new tab.
JobDetail.errorNoApi: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in .env so the site can reach the API.
JobDetail.errorNotFound: This job is missing, unpublished, or no longer available.
JobDetail.errorGeneric: Could not load this job right now.

Company.openJobsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No open positions} one {# open position} other {# open positions}}
Company.emptyTitle: No open roles for this company
Company.emptyBody: When this employer publishes jobs, they will appear here.
Company.errorNoApi: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in .env so the site can reach the API.
Company.errorNotFound: This company does not exist or is not available.
Company.errorGeneric: Could not load this company right now.

EmployersPage.metaDescription: Organizations with published job listings on Šljakam.
EmployersPage.title: Employers
EmployersPage.description: Browse companies that are currently hiring. Each profile links to their open roles.
EmployersPage.headerCompanies: {count, plural, =0 {No companies} one {# company} other {# companies}}
EmployersPage.headerOpenings: {count, plural, =0 {No open roles} one {# open role} other {# open roles}}
EmployersPage.openRoles: {count, plural, =0 {No open roles} one {# open role} other {# open roles}}
EmployersPage.cardInsightHigh: Multiple teams are hiring right now across this organization.
EmployersPage.cardInsightMid: Active hiring is underway with several open opportunities.
EmployersPage.cardInsightLow: A focused hiring cycle with selected open opportunities.
EmployersPage.empty: No employers with published listings yet.
EmployersPage.errorNoApi: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in .env so the site can reach the API.
EmployersPage.errorGeneric: Could not load the employer directory right now.

Employer.loginSubtitle: Access your workspace to manage job listings.
Employer.registerSubtitle: Register your company to post jobs on Šljakam.
Employer.dashboardBody: Manage your listings, submit drafts for moderation, and review applicants from your own jobs.
Employer.dashboardPackagesHint: Choose or change your billing package anytime—open Packages to see your subscriptions, proforma checkout, and live prices.

home.cardListingsBody: Draft roles, send them for moderation, and manage what is live.
home.cardPackagesBody: Track subscriptions, proforma payments, and remaining listing slots.
home.cardPublicBody: Shape how candidates see your company on Šljakam.

newListing.noSubscriptionBody: Active job listings need an activated subscription. Pick a package and complete payment so you can create drafts and submit them for review.
newListing.pendingPaymentBody: Your subscription is waiting for payment. Open your proforma to finish checkout; once Šljakam marks it paid, you can create new listings.
newListing.pickSubscriptionTitle: Which package is this listing for?
newListing.pickSubscriptionBody: You have more than one active subscription. Choose one to open the listing form with the right limits and editor options.
newListing.invalidSubscriptionBody: This link doesn’t match an active subscription. Open packages and use “Add listing” on one of your active purchases.

contactCard.title: Your Šljakam contact for listings
contactCard.name: Name
contactCard.partial: Reach your moderator by email. Additional contact details will appear here when available.
contactCard.unassigned: A Šljakam moderator will be assigned to your company soon. For urgent help, use the site contact details.

packages.heading: Choose a package
packages.lead: Pick a billing period and subscribe. You will receive a proforma invoice to complete payment. Enterprise (Gazda) is arranged with Šljakam staff.
packages.loadError: Packages could not be loaded. Try again later.
packages.loadErrorStaleApi: If you just pulled new code, restart the API (`pnpm dev:api` or your process manager) so `GET /api/employer/packages` is running, then refresh.
packages.catalogEmpty: No billable packages are available yet for checkout.
packages.catalogEmptyHint: Ensure database migrations are applied and package seed data exists (see `drizzle/0012_*` and `scripts/db/seed-domain-baseline.sql`).
packages.subscriptionsLoadError: Your subscriptions could not be loaded. Refresh the page or try again later.

mySubscriptions.title: Your subscriptions
mySubscriptions.lead: Each active package has its own listing slots and editor rules. Track usage here and add a listing under the package you want to bill.
mySubscriptions.empty: You have no subscriptions yet. Pick a package under “Subscribe” to get a proforma.
mySubscriptions.slotMeter: {used} of {max} listings in review or live
mySubscriptions.slotMeterA11y: {used} of {max} listings in review or live
mySubscriptions.slotsRemaining: {count, plural, one {# slot left} other {# slots left}}
mySubscriptions.slotsFullHint: All slots in use — you can still draft; submit unlocks when a slot frees up.
mySubscriptions.slotsFullBanner: Every active package is at capacity for listings in review or live. You can still save drafts; “Submit for review” unlocks when a slot frees up on that package.

packages.promoHint: If you have a campaign code, enter it before checkout. Category restrictions apply when you submit the job for review.
packages.featureMaxJobs: Up to {count, plural, one {# active listing} other {# active listings}}

featured_listing.label: Featured listing
featured_listing.hintLocked: Upgrade your package to feature listings in search results.

png_creative.label: PNG creative
png_creative.hintLocked: Included on higher tiers — HTTPS URL for a richer listing presentation.

crossborder_visible.label: Cross-border visibility
crossborder_visible.hintLocked: Upgrade to show your listing to candidates outside your home market.

social_publish.label: Social publishing
social_publish.hintLocked: Upgrade for scheduled or automated publishing to social surfaces.

paid_social_ads.label: Paid social campaigns
paid_social_ads.hintLocked: Upgrade for paid boost and sponsorship options.

editor_rich.label: Rich-text editor
editor_rich.hintLocked: Your tier uses basic formatting — upgrade for headings, lists, and richer layout.

image_upload.label: Images in description
image_upload.hintLocked: Upgrade to add illustrations or screenshots to the role description.

hyperlinks.label: Hyperlinks
hyperlinks.hintLocked: Upgrade for active links or higher per-listing hyperlink allowances.

packages.compareFeatures: Compare all tiers below on this page.

tezga.title: Tezga
tezga.blurb: Starter presence for hiring teams getting started on Šljakam.

sljaka.title: Šljaka
sljaka.blurb: Growth package with more listings and reach.

sef.title: Šef
sef.blurb: Higher volume and broader city coverage for active recruiters.

gazda.title: Gazda
gazda.blurb: Enterprise billing and entitlements. Arranged with your Šljakam contact.

proforma.heading: Proforma {number}
proforma.loadError: This invoice could not be loaded.
proforma.paymentLead: Transfer the amount due using your company bank. Put the proforma number in the payment reference so finance can match the payment.
proforma.paymentDetail: Bank details also appear on your downloadable PDF.
proforma.paymentContact: Questions? Contact your assigned Šljakam moderator or support.
proforma.pdfSoon: PDF is being generated — refresh in a moment.

jobList.title: Your job listings
jobList.empty: You have no jobs yet. Add one from Packages under an active subscription.
jobList.addListingHint: New listings are created under a specific active package (with its own slots and editor limits).
jobList.readOnlyHint: This job is no longer editable as a draft. Published listings are updated by moderators after review.

applications.title: Applicants
applications.empty: No applications yet for this job.

jobForm.subtitle: Fill in the role details. Save your draft, then submit it for moderator review when ready.
jobForm.subtitlePublished: This job is live. Saving changes sends it back to moderation and it will disappear from public search until approved again.
jobForm.liveEditBanner: Apply method and external URL cannot be changed after publish. Everything else can be updated; moderators will review your changes.
jobForm.applyLockedHint: Cannot be changed for published jobs.
jobForm.descriptionHint: Describe the role, responsibilities, and requirements.
jobForm.taxonomyMissing: Could not load cities and categories. Check NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and try again.
jobForm.publishSlotsFullBanner: Your package’s slots are full: you already have the maximum number of listings in review or live. You can still use this form to prepare a draft, but “Submit for review” stays blocked until you free a slot (for example by archiving a listing) or upgrade your package.
jobForm.submitDisabledSlotsFullHint: No free listing slots — archive or replace a live listing, or upgrade your package, before submitting another job.
jobForm.applyModeInternal: On Šljakam (sign in and upload a CV)
jobForm.externalUrlHint: Must start with https://. In production you can restrict hosts with EXTERNAL_APPLY_HOST_ALLOWLIST on the API.
jobForm.packagingSectionHint: These fields depend on your package. Locked items require an upgrade.
jobForm.featuredHint: Highlight this job in search results.
jobForm.crossborderHint: Show this listing to candidates outside the country.
jobForm.pngCreativeHint: HTTPS link to a PNG image used for richer placement (when your package includes it).
jobForm.pngCreativeInvalidUrl: Enter a valid https:// URL for the PNG creative, or leave the field empty.
jobForm.cityOptionalByPackageHint: Your package does not require a city; add one anyway if it helps candidates.
jobForm.lockedFeatureHint: Included in higher packages — upgrade to unlock.
jobForm.editorKeyboardHint: Shortcuts: Bold ⌘B / Ctrl+B · Italic ⌘I / Ctrl+I · Undo ⌘Z / Ctrl+Z

editor.placeholder: Write a clear description: the role, responsibilities, stack or tools, how you work together, and what you offer. Candidates skim this first—make the opening lines count.

toolbar.notInPackage: Available in a higher package — click to learn more

lockedUpgrade.dialogBody: That formatting control is not included in your current tier. Open Packages to compare tiers and subscribe when you are ready.

Employer.companySlugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Leave blank to generate from the company name.

register.review: Review your details, then create your account.
register.draftRestored: A saved draft was restored. Enter your password again (not stored in the draft).

Employer.emailVerificationBanner: Confirm your email to unlock purchases. In development, the API logs a one-time verification token for your account.

Moderator.loginSubtitle: Moderator or admin access to review job listings.

companies.heading: Companies
companies.companiesLead: Manage assigned companies, pick up leads, and keep employer records ready for listings.
companies.total: {count, plural, =0 {No companies} one {# company} other {# companies}}
companies.createLead: Creates an empty company record. Link employer accounts from the Employers screen.
companies.noMembers: No employer users are linked to this company yet.
companies.salesLead: Track who owns this lead and move it through the sales pipeline.
companies.confirmCloseWon: Mark this lead as closed won?
companies.confirmCloseLost: Mark this lead as closed lost and release it?

jobsNew.noSubscriptionsBody: This company needs an activated subscription before you can create a listing on their behalf.
jobsNew.invalidSubscriptionBody: Pick a valid active package for this company.

staffApi.unconfigured: The app server could not reach the Nest API (missing URL or network). Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to your API origin. If Next runs in Docker, also set NEST_API_URL (or INTERNAL_API_URL) to a host the server can reach (e.g. http://host.docker.internal:4000).

employers.heading: Employer accounts
employers.lead: Link employer users to the right company record before they publish or edit listings.
employers.total: {count, plural, =0 {No employer links} one {# employer link} other {# employer links}}

queue.heading: Queue
queue.lead: Review submitted listings, filter by workflow state, and open the public-quality preview before taking action.
queue.total: {count, plural, =0 {No listings} one {# listing} other {# listings}}

billingPending.heading: Subscriptions awaiting bank payment
billingPending.lead: Only companies assigned to you appear here. After you confirm the incoming transfer, mark paid to issue the invoice and activate the package.
billingPending.empty: No subscriptions are waiting for payment from your assigned companies.

review.candidatePreviewHint: Rich text and packaging match the public listing once published.
review.publishDirectHint: Publishes immediately and marks the listing as review-bypassed for integrations. Use only when policy allows.
review.unpublishHint: Removes the listing from public search by archiving it.
review.noActions: No moderation actions for this state.
review.adminOverrideHint: Immediately archives this job regardless of status. Use sparingly for policy or legal reasons.

home.heading: Admin overview
home.lead: Manage users, taxonomy, and review staff actions. Moderation tools remain under the staff portal.
home.cardTaxonomyBody: Maintain categories that power filters and listing classification.
home.cardCompaniesBody: Review company ownership and reassign moderator responsibility.
home.cardBillingBody: Activate enterprise subscriptions after contractual payment is confirmed.

companies.listHint: Open a company to view assignment history and reassign the owning moderator.
companies.reassignReasonPlaceholder: Explain the reassignment for the audit log

users.heading: Users
users.total: {count, plural, =0 {No users} one {# user} other {# users}}
users.hint: You cannot change your own role here. At least one admin must remain.

taxonomy.pageLead: Categories power filters and job classification. Deleting is blocked while jobs still reference a category.
taxonomy.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? This cannot be undone.

audit.heading: Staff audit log
audit.lead: Review staff actions, policy-sensitive changes, and system events.
audit.total: {count, plural, =0 {No events} one {# event} other {# events}}

promoCodes.pageLead: Create marketing codes, caps, and category targeting. Codes are uppercase; validity dates use UTC boundaries from the picked calendar day.
promoCodes.dateHint: Dates use each day’s start (00:00 UTC) and end (23:59:59.999 UTC) for from/to fields.
promoCodes.fieldPackagesHint: Leave empty to allow all packages. Enforcement applies when an employer checks out with this promo.
promoCodes.fieldCategoriesHint: Leave empty to allow all categories. Enforcement happens when an employer submits or publishes a job.

billingEnterprise.heading: GAZDA subscriptions awaiting activation
billingEnterprise.lead: Activate after contractual payment is confirmed. This issues the invoice and unlocks Enterprise features.
billingEnterprise.empty: No enterprise subscriptions are pending activation.

Errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check the form fields and try again.
Errors.DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE: The database is not available. Try again later.
Errors.CITY_SLUG_UNKNOWN: That city could not be found.
Errors.CATEGORY_SLUG_UNKNOWN: That category could not be found.
Errors.EMPLOYER_NOT_SETUP: Your employer profile is not set up yet.
Errors.JOB_NOT_FOUND: That job could not be found.
Errors.JOB_FORBIDDEN_COMPANY: That job belongs to another company.
Errors.JOB_NOT_DRAFT: That action only applies to job drafts.
Errors.JOB_CREATE_FAILED: The job could not be created. Try again.
Errors.JOB_POSTING_NO_SUBSCRIPTION: Choose and activate a package before creating a job listing.
Errors.JOB_POSTING_PENDING_PAYMENT: Complete payment for your subscription before creating a job listing.
Errors.JOB_POSTING_SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: Choose which active package this listing belongs to, then try again.
Errors.SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_ACTIVE: That subscription is not active. Open Packages and pick an active package to add a listing.
Errors.JOB_POSTING_AT_CAPACITY: You have reached the maximum active listings allowed by your package. Free a slot or upgrade before creating another listing.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH: The description is too long for your package.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_CITY_REQUIRED: Choose a city — your package requires a location.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_HYPERLINK_FORBIDDEN: Your package does not allow links in the description.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_HYPERLINK_COUNT: Too many links in the description for your package.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_HYPERLINK_TOO_EARLY: Add more text before your first link — your description must have enough body text before external links.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_HYPERLINK_HOST_BLOCKED: That external link host is not allowed in job descriptions.
Errors.EDITOR_CAPABILITY_DENIED: Some formatting in the description is not allowed on your package.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_EDITOR: Some formatting in the description is not allowed on your package.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_FEATURED_FORBIDDEN: Featured listings are not included in your package.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_CROSSBORDER_FORBIDDEN: Cross-border visibility is not included in your package.
Errors.JOB_ENTITLEMENTS_PNG_CREATIVE_FORBIDDEN: A PNG creative URL is not included in your package.
Errors.JOB_DESCRIPTION_IMAGE_NOT_ENTITLED: Uploaded images inside the description are not included in this package tier.
Errors.JOB_DESCRIPTION_IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: Inline images must be at most 2 MB.
Errors.JOB_DESCRIPTION_IMAGE_TYPE_FORBIDDEN: Only PNG or JPEG images are accepted.
Errors.JOB_DESCRIPTION_IMAGE_DIMENSIONS_INVALID: Images must measure at least 1200 × 630 pixels after upload.
Errors.JOB_DESCRIPTION_IMAGE_PROCESS_FAILED: Could not process that image. Try another PNG or JPEG.
Errors.SUBSCRIPTION_SLOT_OVERRIDE_FORBIDDEN: Listing slot overrides are only available for ŠEF or GAZDA subscriptions.
Errors.JOB_INVALID_STATE: That action is not allowed for this job’s current status.
Errors.JOB_SLUG_COLLISION: Could not allocate a unique URL for this job. Try again.
Errors.JOB_ENTERPRISE_DIRECT_PUBLISH_FORBIDDEN: Direct publish through this admin path requires an active enterprise (GAZDA) subscription for the company.
Errors.JOB_TRIVIAL_PATCH_EXCEEDED: That change is too large for a trivial listing correction. Use the normal edit flow instead.
Errors.JOB_APPLY_MODE_IMMUTABLE: How candidates apply (internal vs external URL) cannot be changed after a job is published.
Errors.JOB_EXTERNAL_APPLY_ONLY: This job only accepts applications on the employer’s website.
Errors.EXTERNAL_APPLY_URL_FORBIDDEN: That external apply URL is not allowed.
Errors.EXTERNAL_APPLY_CLICK_RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
Errors.AUTH_EMAIL_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.
Errors.AUTH_COMPANY_SLUG_TAKEN: Could not pick a unique company URL. Try a different name or slug.
Errors.AUTH_COMPANY_SLUG_FORMAT: Company URL must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
Errors.AUTH_REFRESH_INVALID: Your session is invalid. Please sign in again.
Errors.HTTP_EXCEPTION: The request could not be completed.
Errors.NOT_FOUND: Nothing was found for this request.
Errors.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
Errors.CONFLICT: This action conflicts with existing data.
Errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have access to this.
Errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our side.
Errors.COMPANY_NOT_FOUND: That company could not be found.
Errors.COMPANY_SLUG_TAKEN: That company URL slug is already in use.
Errors.EMPLOYER_NOT_FOUND: That employer link could not be found.
Errors.EMPLOYER_ALREADY_LINKED: Your account is already linked to a company. Multi-company support is coming later.
Errors.CATEGORY_SLUG_TAKEN: That category slug is already in use.
Errors.CATEGORY_IN_USE: That category is still used by jobs and cannot be deleted.
Errors.CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_ROLE: You cannot change your own role here.
Errors.LAST_ADMIN_REQUIRED: At least one administrator must remain.
Errors.JOB_NOT_PUBLISHED: This job is not accepting applications.
Errors.APPLICATION_ALREADY_EXISTS: You have already applied to this job.
Errors.APPLICATION_REAPPLY_COOLDOWN: You withdrew recently. Wait 24 hours before applying to this job again.
Errors.APPLICATION_RESUME_REQUIRED: Upload a CV on your profile (or choose one here) before applying.
Errors.APPLICATION_SUBMIT_RATE_LIMITED: Too many applications in one day. Try again tomorrow.
Errors.APPLICATION_WITHDRAW_FORBIDDEN: This application can no longer be withdrawn.
Errors.CANDIDATE_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Verify your email before submitting an application.
Errors.RESUME_NOT_FOUND: That CV could not be found.
Errors.RESUME_INVALID_TYPE: Invalid file type or size for your CV.
Errors.RESUME_IN_USE: This CV is attached to an application and cannot be deleted.
Errors.STAFF_COMPANY_LIST_VIEW_FORBIDDEN: You cannot open that company list view.
Errors.STAFF_COMPANY_PATCH_FORBIDDEN: You cannot edit this company in its current state.
Errors.STAFF_COMPANY_PICKUP_FORBIDDEN: This company cannot be picked up right now.
Errors.STAFF_COMPANY_CLOSE_FORBIDDEN: You cannot change the sales status for this company.
Errors.COMPANY_IDENTIFIER_TAKEN: Another company already uses this PIB, MB, VAT ID, or identifier.
Errors.ADMIN_COMPANY_REASSIGN_TARGET_INVALID: Choose an active moderator as the new owner.
Errors.PACKAGE_PRICE_NOT_FOUND: That package or price option is not available.
Errors.PACKAGE_ENTITLEMENTS_INCOMPLETE: This package is not fully configured yet. Try again later.
Errors.ENTERPRISE_PACKAGE_FORBIDDEN: Enterprise billing is handled by an administrator.
Errors.PROMO_CODE_INVALID: That promo code is not valid.
Errors.PROMO_NOT_ACTIVE: That promo code is not active for this period.
Errors.PROMO_PACKAGE_INELIGIBLE: That promo does not apply to the package you selected.
Errors.PROMO_MAX_PER_COMPANY: Your company has already used this promo as many times as allowed.
Errors.PROMO_MAX_REDEMPTIONS: That promo code has reached its usage limit.
Errors.PROMO_JOB_CATEGORY_REQUIRED: Choose a job category that matches this promotional subscription.
Errors.PROMO_JOB_CATEGORY_MISMATCH: This job’s category does not match the promotional subscription.
Errors.PROMO_CATEGORY_RULE_CONFLICT: Promotional rules conflict for this subscription. Contact support.
Errors.PROMO_CODE_NOT_FOUND: That promo code record was not found.
Errors.PROMO_INVALID_VALUE: That discount value is not allowed.
Errors.PROMO_INVALID_WINDOW: The validity window for that promo is invalid.
Errors.PROMO_CODE_DUPLICATE: A promo with that code already exists.
Errors.SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND: That subscription could not be found.
Errors.SUBSCRIPTION_INVALID_STATE: This action is not allowed for the subscription’s current status.
Errors.SUBSCRIPTION_FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to manage this subscription.

Candidate.loginSubtitle: Apply to jobs and track your applications.
Candidate.registerSubtitle: Search jobs and apply with your profile and CV.
Candidate.fullNameOptional: Optional — you can add this later

home.heading: Welcome
home.body: Browse open roles, apply with your CV, and track applications from the navigation above.
home.cardApplicationsBody: Track each submission and follow status changes in one place.
home.cardProfileBody: Keep your personal details and uploaded resumes current.
home.cardCvBody: Use the step-by-step builder to generate a polished CV PDF quickly.

applications.heading: My applications
applications.loadError: Could not load your applications. Try again later.
applications.empty: You have not applied to any jobs yet.

profile.heading: Profile & CV
profile.subheading: Update your display name and manage uploaded CV files (PDF or Word, max 5MB).
profile.resumeHint: Upload PDF or Word documents. Files are stored securely and shown to employers when you apply.
profile.resumesLoadError: Could not load your CV list.

apply.coverPlaceholder: Briefly explain your interest and fit…
apply.resumeHint: Upload and manage CVs from your profile.
apply.emailNotVerifiedLead: We need a verified email address before you can submit an application. Use the verification link sent to your inbox, then return here.

cvBuild.title: Build your CV
cvBuild.lead: Complete each step, pick a template, and generate a PDF. It is saved with your other CVs and becomes your primary CV.
cvBuild.taxonomyError: Could not load locations. Try again later.
cvBuild.headline: Headline
cvBuild.experienceHint: Add roles in the order you want them to appear (newest first is typical).
cvBuild.previewPlaceholder: Choose a template to see the PDF preview.
cvBuild.generateHint: We save your profile first, then render the PDF on the server.
cvBuild.previewValidationHint: Preview uses only complete rows (with required dates). Fix:
cvBuild.validationError: Please fix your experience, education, and skills (dates and required fields).

Integration.title: System integration (dev)
Integration.description: Live checks against Nest, Postgres, Redis, BullMQ, and Sanity (when configured).
Integration.hint: Open /sr/integration and /en/integration. With worker running, enqueue from API should log integration_ping_job in worker stdout.
